topIngredients.name: Retinol
topIngredients.benefit: Clinically proven to reduce fine lines around the eyes

topIngredients.name: Mineral Oil
topIngredients.benefit: Occlusive that seals moisture in the thin eye-area skin

topIngredients.name: Shea Butter
topIngredients.benefit: Prevents dryness and flaking during retinol treatment

verdict: RoC Retinol Under Eye Cream is the gold standard for budget anti-aging eye care. The retinol concentration is safe for the thin periorbital skin while delivering visible line reduction over consistent use.
